title: Universal Multitool Hatchet Hammer Pry Bar Utility Axe for Emergency Survival
description:
The 3-in-1 Multi-Function Hatchet is useful in many situations. With a pry bar, hammer, and hatchet all in one, this tool is ideal for both construction and dismantling. Use it to cut fire wood or pry your way out of a situation. This 3-in-1 hatchet is an incredible survival/camping tool designed to help you with the various requirements of roughing it outdoors. You also will save considerable weight rather than carrying three separate tools with you in your camping/survival gear. It is made out of solid steel and you can use in a number of ways, including setting up camp and salvaging equipment. It features a long rubberized handle for superior grip.
